name: Vocational Rehab Options Post-Ladder Fall

mainEntity.name: Can I get vocational rehab for career change after ladder fall in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Can I get vocational rehab for career change after ladder fall in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if ladder injury prevents return to pre-injury job, Utah comp provides retraining up to 36 months, $12K tuition max, plus maintenance benefits during program.

suggestedAnswer.text: Prove 'odd lot' status or substantial hindrance to employment. Midvale claims often qualify roofers/roofer ladders. Programs via Division-approved providers. Insurers resist—get attorney to secure full benefits before settling.
